item_description.p: Description: This small device can be hurled at a vehicle, robot, or individual. It sticks to the target magnetically and emits a powerful electro- magnetic pulse in a 6 m radius. All electronics in that radius might falter and fail. Modern electronics are robust and designed to recover. Consider the EMP grenade to create a stun effect targeting robots, vehicles, computers, and various hand-held or implanted technology. Treat all such objects as having a 50% STR for resistance check and recovery purposes. Characters should be warned about the large blast radius. It won’t help the player much if he disables all his own tech as well!

Description: This implant allows the character to communicate via radio frequencies with other communication devices, such as wristcoms. Modern-tech comm net implants allow 5 km range, high-tech implants allow 10 km range, and cutting-edge ones allow 10 km range and can connect to digital networks on populated worlds to operate just like a hands-free version of the traditional hand-held communicator.
